title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational initiative from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning to school-aged students. The program provides research-backed pedagogical resources including lessons, videos, worksheets, and training that support responsible and ethical AI education, reaching students in over 165 countries.
